• Interactive educational website explaining nuclear energy concepts
  • Covers nuclear fission, uranium enrichment, reactor types, and fusion
  • Features Cold War history comparing US and Soviet reactor designs
  • Includes modern geopolitical context about Iran's nuclear program
  • Implements smooth animations, particle backgrounds, and parallax effects
    const particles = [];
    class Particle { update() { this.x += this.speedX; } }

This comprehensive nuclear energy explainer combines interactive visualizations with historical context and modern geopolitical issues. The site uses advanced web technologies including particle systems, scroll-triggered animations, and SVG graphics to create an engaging educational experience about both the science and global implications of nuclear technology.
